name: Peanut Butter-Chocolate Bon Bons
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend margarine, peanut butter, and confectioner's sugar until smooth.
2. Crush the cereal slightly in a plastic bag.
3. Add the crushed cereal to the peanut butter mixture and mix well.
4. Roll the mixture into 3/4 inch balls.
5. Chill for one hour.
6. Melt chocolate slowly in the top of a double boiler, stirring constantly.
7. Dip each ball into the melted chocolate, coating completely.
8. Place the coated bon bons on wax paper to cool.
9. Makes 7-8 dozen. Source: Ham Journal Dec.83
